name: Hot and Spicy Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees.
2. In a small bowl, mix together the paprika, caraway seeds, onion flakes, dry mustard, lemon peel, dried thyme leaves, salt, and ground red pepper.
3. Brush the chicken wings with melted butter.
4. Lightly coat the chicken wings with the paprika mixture using your hands.
5. Place the chicken wings on a rack in a large roasting pan.
6. Bake for 30 minutes or until the chicken wings are fork-tender.
7. Place the cooked chicken wings on a platter.
8. Garnish with whole green and red chilies.
Serves 6.
